# Live Product Tour: Email Deliverability

Webinar

# Live Product Tour: Email Deliverability

July 25, 2025

30 minutes

On demand

## Description

Ready to take your email strategy further? ?

Watch as Justin Foulk, MBA, Senior Manager of Email Deliverability Services at Iterable, gives a live walkthrough of email deliverability workflows.

In this session, you’ll discover:

? How to design workflows that keep your emails landing in the inbox  
? Proven tactics to protect and improve your sender reputation  
⚡ Real-world examples you can start using right away

Whether you’re building your first deliverability plan or fine-tuning an existing one, you’ll walk away with actionable strategies you can apply immediately!
